channel.title: Agent Lab
channel.description: The Ultimate AI Agent Discovery Platform

item.title: Experiment #013: superpowers
item.description: - Composable skills framework automating spec→design→implementation workflows for AI coding agents - Enforces TDD, YAGNI, DRY principles; enables multi-hour autonomous agent task execution without plan deviation - AI engineers, agentic development teams building production-grade software with Claude, Cursor, Codex agents

item.title: Experiment #012: open-swe
item.description: - Builds internal coding agents with LangGraph/Deep Agents framework composable architecture - Enables sandbox execution, Slack/Linear integration, and autonomous PR generation for engineering teams - Platform engineers customizing AI coding assistants for enterprise codebases and workflows

item.title: Experiment #011: claude-hud
item.description: - Displays context window usage, active tools, agents, and todo progress in Claude Code's statusline - Prevents context overflow by showing real token counts and consumption rates before hitting limits - Claude Code users managing complex multi-agent workflows requiring visibility into resource utilization

item.title: Experiment #010: claude-hud
item.description: - Renders real-time context usage, tool activity, and agent status in Claude Code's statusline - Prevents context window overflow by displaying native token metrics and consumption rates - Claude Code power users managing complex multi-agent workflows and long sessions

item.title: Experiment #009: opendataloader-pdf
item.description: - Extracts structured data (Markdown, JSON, HTML) from PDFs with #1 benchmark accuracy (0.90) - Automates PDF accessibility compliance via auto-tagging to Tagged PDF/PDF/UA standards - For developers building RAG/LLM pipelines and accessibility-focused applications

item.title: Experiment #008: opendataloader-pdf
item.description: （要約エラー: Error code: 404 - {'type': 'error', 'error': {'type': 'not_found_error', 'message': 'model: claude-3-5-haiku-20241022'}, 'request_id': 'req_011CZEAT7fxiWxqccANASYy9'}） 説明: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.
